title: Yekaterinburg, Sverdlovsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Yekaterinburg, Sverdlovsk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Yekaterinburg is a city in Sverdlovsk Oblast with a population of 1,500,000. The capital of the Urals, a key industrial and cultural hub where Europe meets Asia, known for its constructivist architecture.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
